categories.name: Enduring the Cold
categories.description: There's worse things than being on a tropical island.

questions.question: What year was our department originally formed???
questions.factoid: The department was originally formed as a small pilot team and grew to its current size over the next decade.

questions.question: Which of these is NOT one of our department's core values?
questions.factoid: We deliberately avoided buzzwords like 'synergy' when defining the values — the goal was to pick words that meant something specific.

categories.name: Pop Culture Foraging
categories.description: Persistence in Movies, TV, music, and the internet.

questions.question: Robinson Curusoe is based on the real person, Alexander Selkirk who survived alone on an island for four years and four months in the early 1700's. How did he get stranded there?

answers.text: He survived a pirate attack and landed there as the sole survivor.
He requested to remain on the island after deciding their vessel was not seaworthy.
He was marooned by the Spanish Navy for assisting smugglers.
He escaped a mutiny after his crew decided they could find Atlantis.

questions.factoid: He begged to be let back on board as they were leaving, but the ship actually did sink a short time later.

questions.question: Which logo is shown here?
questions.factoid: Spotify launched in Sweden in 2008 and now has over 600 million users worldwide.

questions.question: What is the capital of Australia?
questions.factoid: Canberra was chosen as a compromise capital in 1908 because Sydney and Melbourne couldn't agree on which of them should be the capital.

questions.question: Which country's flag is this?
questions.factoid: Italy's flag (the 'Tricolore') was inspired by the French flag and dates back to 1797.

questions.question: In the comic stip Calvin and Hobbes, what was the occupation of Calvin's father?
questions.factoid: This is revealed in only one strip where his father reads him the patent information at his desk as a sardonic 'story' over the phone.

questions.question: What is the east-west highway that leads to (now closed) Crossroads Theater?
questions.factoid: When I was 16 I tried to meet my friend at Crossroads to see Spider Man, I got on the wrong highway and ended up in Yukon
